# terrible_cisco_meraki_networks_pii_sm_devices_for_key_info (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against

### Optional

- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `bluetoothMac` (String) Information module for Networks Pii Smdevicesforkey Info. BluetoothMac query parameter. The MAC of a Bluetooth client.
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `email` (String) Information module for Networks Pii Smdevicesforkey Info. Email query parameter. The email of a network user account or a Systems Manager device.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of nameâ†’value).
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `headers` (String) Additional headers.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `imei` (String) Information module for Networks Pii Smdevicesforkey Info. Imei query parameter. The IMEI of a Systems Manager device.
- `mac` (String) Information module for Networks Pii Smdevicesforkey Info. Mac query parameter. The MAC of a network client device or a Systems Manager device.
- `networkId` (String) Information module for Networks Pii Smdevicesforkey Info. NetworkId path parameter. Network ID.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `serial` (String) Information module for Networks Pii Smdevicesforkey Info. Serial query parameter. The serial of a Systems Manager device.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution
- `username` (String) Information module for Networks Pii Smdevicesforkey Info. Username query parameter. The username of a Systems Manager user.

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
- `meraki_response` (String) A dictionary or list with the response returned by the Cisco Meraki Python SDK
